metadata.name: Bloodthirst 2 — Stormblood Berserker enters as 3/3
metadata.description: Tests Bloodthirst 2 (CR 702.54a). p1 first deals damage to p2 via Lightning Bolt, satisfying the Bloodthirst condition. p1 then casts Stormblood Berserker ({1}{R}). Because an opponent was dealt damage this turn, Stormblood Berserker enters the battlefield with 2 +1/+1 counters, making it a 3/3 instead of its base 1/1.
metadata.generation_notes: Stormblood Berserker oracle text: Bloodthirst 2, Menace. Base P/T is 1/1. When Bloodthirst triggers (opponent was dealt damage this turn), the permanent enters with 2 +1/+1 counters, making effective P/T 3/3. Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to p2 in the first step to satisfy the Bloodthirst condition. p1 starts with {R}{R}{R} in pool (1R for bolt, 1R generic for berserker). After bolt resolves, p2 drops to 37 life. Then Stormblood Berserker is cast for {1}{R} and ETBs as 3/3. The assert uses power: 3 and toughness: 3 to verify the counters applied correctly.

script.step_note: p1 casts Lightning Bolt targeting p2 to satisfy Bloodthirst condition

actions.description: Initial: p1 has Lightning Bolt and Stormblood Berserker in hand; p2 at 40 life
actions.note: Both spells in hand, p2 undamaged.
CR 601.2: p1 casts Lightning Bolt targeting p2 for {R}.

actions.description: After casting Lightning Bolt: stack has 1 object, hand has 1 card
actions.note: Lightning Bolt moved from hand to stack.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — top of stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 120.3: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to p2.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Lightning Bolt resolves; p2 is dealt 3 damage; card goes to p1 graveyard.

actions.description: After Lightning Bolt resolves: p2 at 37 life, stack empty, Bloodthirst condition met
actions.note: An opponent was dealt damage this turn — Bloodthirst 2 will trigger when Stormblood Berserker enters.

script.step_note: p1 casts Stormblood Berserker; Bloodthirst 2 applies on ETB

actions.note: CR 601.2: p1 casts Stormblood Berserker for {1}{R} (paid as 2 red from pool).

actions.description: After casting: Stormblood Berserker on stack, hand empty
actions.note: Stormblood Berserker is on the stack awaiting resolution.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Stormblood Berserker resolves.

resolution.note: CR 702.54a: Bloodthirst 2 — p2 was dealt damage this turn, so Stormblood Berserker enters with 2 +1/+1 counters.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Stormblood Berserker resolves and enters the battlefield. Bloodthirst 2 applies — it enters with 2 +1/+1 counters, making it a 3/3.

actions.description: Final: Stormblood Berserker on battlefield as 3/3 with 2 +1/+1 counters; stack empty
actions.note: Bloodthirst 2 applied: base 1/1 + 2 counters = 3/3. CR 702.54a confirmed.
